SusyGordon

Forged in the Fire.

Now in Pursuit of Purpose.

I build platforms for people's stories — from the boardroom to the back roads to the street corner. Three ecosystems. One mission. Every level speaks life to the one below it.

Building from the front seat of my car while driving rideshare through Fort Worth, Texas. The car became a prayer closet, a studio, a sanctuary, a conference room, and a mission field.

Matthew 7:7  ·  "Seek and find."

My Story
"On the Trinity Trail, I heard it three times — Seek and Find. That was the beginning."

— Susy Gordon  ·  Founder  ·  Fort Worth, TX

I spent 25 years in corporate America — IT strategy, agile transformation, broadcasting, project management. I was good at it. But in June 2025, I stepped away from all of it to build something that actually mattered to me.

I'm a faith-driven builder. I believe every person carries a story worth telling, and that story has the power to lift the person standing just below them. That's not a metaphor — it's an architecture. And I've been building it platform by platform, person by person, right here in Fort Worth.

Mega Mission Media funds the mission. Joy Rides documents the journey. Fort Worth Fitness Sanctuary is the destination for those who need it most. And somewhere in the middle of all of it — I'm still seeking, still finding.

Connect

that matters.
